---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case this feature addresses. Be specific about who is affected and how frequently.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Include any relevant design considerations or constraints.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.
